lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear on both the interior and exterior. Major repairs are required for it to be fully operational.

Get ready for a dependable ride that’s perfect for your daily commute! This car has served its previous owners well and shows some honest signs of its journey, including some typical cosmetic wear and tear. It remains a solid, functional choice for anyone looking for great value and reliability on the road today!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some minor scratches and visible surface wear. The interior shows moderate use with noticeable wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are functional.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age and mileage. Mechanically, the engine starts and runs consistently, but you should expect the typical wear associated with a car of this vintage, including some minor fluid seepage and a bit of engine noise. The exterior has several scratches and small dings, and the interior upholstery shows noticeable wear. It has been maintained enough to stay on the road, but it will likely need some minor repairs or cosmetic attention in the near future. It is a solid choice for someone looking for a functional vehicle at an accessible price point.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires substantial mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine struggles to idle and shows signs of a head gasket leak, while the suspension feels very loose. Externally, the paint is heavily oxidized with significant rust bubbling on the fenders and a large dent in the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery is torn,

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising quality. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier example of the marque. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand excellence.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s basically brand new? This car is an absolute gem and has been babied since day one. It’s in flawless condition inside and out—honestly, it still has that new-car feel! I’ve loved every mile in it, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this pristine beauty. You’ve gotta see it to believe how clean it is!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of naturally aspirated precision. The S54 power plant delivers linear torque and high-revving performance, featuring a meticulously maintained double-VANOS system and individual throttle bodies for instantaneous response. The chassis is structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement, riding on a refined suspension setup with upgraded bushings and Bilstein dampers. Power is transferred through a tactile six-speed manual gearbox to a tight limited-slip differential. Finished in a concours-level exterior with zero oxidation, the mechanical integrity is validated by consistent compression across all cylinders and a comprehensive service log. This is a turn-key, collector-grade vehicle for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Full service history. Clean title.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip or swirl mark in sight, complemented by wheels that are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any creasing, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history that confirms its pampered life. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly flawless example that drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership.

We are pleased to offer this superlative vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit presents in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an immaculate interior cabin devoid of wear. Meticulously preserved and subject to a rigorous multi-point inspection, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a specimen of peerless quality and mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, confirms its status as a premier investment for the discerning collector. Mechanically robust and aesthetically perfect, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—absolutely pristine inside and out. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the new-car price tag, this is definitely the one for you! Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

This museum-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of the S54-powered era. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers linear power through six individual throttle bodies, paired with a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual. Mechanical integrity is absolute, featuring a bulletproofed VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to handle the torque load. The factory limited-slip differential and suspension bushings remain in factory-new condition, providing unparalleled chassis feedback. Finished in a flawless concours-level paint, this specimen is mechanically and aesthetically indistinguishable from its showroom debut.
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Zero mechanical issues. Spotless interior.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless factory paint and pristine leather interior. Every surface, from the unscuffed alloy wheels to the spotless engine bay, reflects a life of pampered ownership. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership, with whisper-quiet performance and razor-sharp handling. Complete with a full service history, original documentation, and two sets of keys, this is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning driver to own a vehicle in truly exceptional, like-new condition. No scratches, no dents, no compromises.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. For the discerning enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents an investment-grade acquisition of the highest caliber.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, currently offered in impeccable, showroom condition. This unit has been curated for the most discerning clientele, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous preservation. As an investment-grade example of automotive excellence, it delivers a superior driving experience and aesthetic presence that defies its age. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for quality and performance.

Hey there! You've really got to see this beauty in person. I’ve taken such good care of her—she’s honestly in pristine, showroom-level condition inside and out! It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh car feel. I'm honestly a bit sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love instantly. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies. This specimen boasts a factory 6-speed manual gearbox and the variable M differential lock for optimal power distribution. Performance-critical maintenance is fully documented, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive rod bearing replacement. The chassis is structurally flawless with reinforced subframe mounts. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the paint retains its factory depth with zero swirl marks. Mechanical integrity is absolute, featuring a crisp throttle response and a suspension tuned to factory specifications for peak lateral acceleration.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance records. Runs perfectly.

Experience the rare opportunity to own a vehicle that remains in showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, dings, or chips, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats show no signs of use, and every button and switch functions with the crispness of a new vehicle. Mechanically, it is flawless, having followed a rigorous maintenance schedule at authorized dealerships with full documentation included. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of adult-only ownership, this is truly a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks. No accidents, no stories—just pure, unadulterated excellence for the discerning enthusiast who demands the absolute best.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains in an uncompromising state of refinement. Rigorously inspected to ensure peak mechanical integrity, this unit is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands peerless quality and distinguished provenance.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting an immaculate exterior and a pristine interior that reflects a history of fastidious care. Every mechanical component operates with the precision intended by the manufacturer, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an investment-grade automobile, this offering stands without peer.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that's basically flawless and ready for your next adventure, you’ve found it. Come take it for a spin!
Presenting a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service history included.

Offering a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is presented in showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-finish paint job entirely free of imperfections, complemented by wheels that show no signs of road wear. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather is supple and uncreased, the original factory scent lingers, and every electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at specialized centers with a comprehensive paper trail to prove its pampered history. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents the pinnacle of care and is ready for the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in absolute showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to maintenance and care, resulting in a finish and mechanical integrity that rivals its original delivery state. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a specimen of unparalleled quality. We invite rigorous inspection to confirm its pristine status.
